views.formula_section: Analysis of Short-term Selection Experiments: 2. Mixed-model and Bayesian Approaches: Introduction

prerequisite_concepts.name: Time
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A quantity indexing the stage, generation, or interval of the process.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 表示过程所处阶段、世代或时间间隔的量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Z
prerequisite_concepts.definition: Z is a local mathematical quantity introduced by the supporting formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: Z 是由当前支撑公式引入的局部数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Parameter Vector
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A collection of model parameters treated as one vector.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 把多个模型参数作为一个向量整体表示。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Lambda
prerequisite_concepts.definition: Lambda is a local mathematical quantity introduced by the supporting formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: Lambda 是由当前支撑公式引入的局部数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Vector or Matrix Quantity
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A structured mathematical quantity represented as a vector or matrix.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Vector or Matrix Quantity
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A structured mathematical quantity represented as a vector or matrix.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Vector or Matrix Quantity
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A structured mathematical quantity represented as a vector or matrix.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Beta
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A model parameter, regression coefficient, or distribution-shape parameter named beta in the local context.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 局部模型中记为 beta 的参数、回归系数或分布形状参数。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Estimator Vector
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A vector-valued statistic used to estimate several parameters.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 用于同时估计多个参数的向量统计量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Value
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The additive genetic contribution to an individual or trait value.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 个体或性状值中的加性遗传贡献。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Coefficient
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A scalar multiplier that controls the size of a term in the formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 控制公式中某一项大小的乘数。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Distance
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A measure of separation between states, values, or functions.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量状态、数值或函数之间分离程度的量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: E
prerequisite_concepts.definition: E is a local mathematical quantity introduced by the supporting formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: E 是由当前支撑公式引入的局部数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Function
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Function
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Index
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A position marker used to identify a class, state, or summation term.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 用于标记类别、状态或求和项位置的下标。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Mean
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The average value of a quantity in the relevant distribution or population.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 相关分布或群体中某个量的平均值。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Fitness
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A measure of reproductive success or contribution to the next generation.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量个体繁殖成功或对下一代贡献的量。

introduced_concepts.name: Cost
introduced_concepts.definition: Sampling variance-covariance matrices for and also follow from the mixed-model equations.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Cost 是当前公式涉及的背景概念，用来帮助解释模型中的生物学含义。

introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

introduced_concepts.name: Vector or Matrix Quantity
introduced_concepts.definition: A structured mathematical quantity represented as a vector or matrix.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

introduced_concepts.name: Identity Matrix
introduced_concepts.definition: A matrix with ones on the diagonal and zeros elsewhere.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 对角线为 1、其他位置为 0 的矩阵。

introduced_concepts.name: Sigma Sub a Power 2(t)
introduced_concepts.definition: Generation t onward (say, to generation T), and the relationship matrix is adjusted to assume that generation t is the base population.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Sigma Sub a Power 2(t) 是当前公式涉及的背景概念，用来帮助解释模型中的生物学含义。

prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: Lambda 是由当前支撑公式引入的局部数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Vector or Matrix Quantity
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A structured mathematical quantity represented as a vector or matrix.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Vector or Matrix Quantity
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A structured mathematical quantity represented as a vector or matrix.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Beta
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A model parameter, regression coefficient, or distribution-shape parameter named beta in the local context.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 局部模型中记为 beta 的参数、回归系数或分布形状参数。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Estimator Vector
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A vector-valued statistic used to estimate several parameters.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 用于同时估计多个参数的向量统计量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Value
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The additive genetic contribution to an individual or trait value.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 个体或性状值中的加性遗传贡献。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Coefficient
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A scalar multiplier that controls the size of a term in the formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 控制公式中某一项大小的乘数。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Distance
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A measure of separation between states, values, or functions.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量状态、数值或函数之间分离程度的量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: E
prerequisite_concepts.definition: E is a local mathematical quantity introduced by the supporting formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: E 是由当前支撑公式引入的局部数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Function
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Function
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Index
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A position marker used to identify a class, state, or summation term.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 用于标记类别、状态或求和项位置的下标。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Mean
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The average value of a quantity in the relevant distribution or population.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 相关分布或群体中某个量的平均值。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Fitness
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A measure of reproductive success or contribution to the next generation.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量个体繁殖成功或对下一代贡献的量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Beta

prerequisite_concepts.definition: The additive genetic contribution to an individual or trait value.

prerequisite_concepts.name: Coefficient
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A scalar multiplier that controls the size of a term in the formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 控制公式中某一项大小的乘数。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Distance
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A measure of separation between states, values, or functions.

prerequisite_concepts.name: E
prerequisite_concepts.definition: E is a local mathematical quantity introduced by the supporting formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: E 是由当前支撑公式引入的局部数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Function
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Function
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Index
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A position marker used to identify a class, state, or summation term.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 用于标记类别、状态或求和项位置的下标。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Mean
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The average value of a quantity in the relevant distribution or population.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 相关分布或群体中某个量的平均值。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Fitness
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A measure of reproductive success or contribution to the next generation.

prerequisite_concepts.name: Beta

prerequisite_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Value
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The additive genetic contribution to an individual or trait value.

prerequisite_concepts.name: Coefficient
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A scalar multiplier that controls the size of a term in the formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 控制公式中某一项大小的乘数。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Distance
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A measure of separation between states, values, or functions.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量状态、数值或函数之间分离程度的量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: E
prerequisite_concepts.definition: E is a local mathematical quantity introduced by the supporting formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: E 是由当前支撑公式引入的局部数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Function
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.

prerequisite_concepts.name: Function
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Index
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A position marker used to identify a class, state, or summation term.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 用于标记类别、状态或求和项位置的下标。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Mean
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The average value of a quantity in the relevant distribution or population.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 相关分布或群体中某个量的平均值。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Fitness
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A measure of reproductive success or contribution to the next generation.

prerequisite_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.

prerequisite_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.

prerequisite_concepts.name: Index
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A position marker used to identify a class, state, or summation term.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 用于标记类别、状态或求和项位置的下标。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Mean
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The average value of a quantity in the relevant distribution or population.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 相关分布或群体中某个量的平均值。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Fitness
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A measure of reproductive success or contribution to the next generation.

introduced_concepts.name: Eigenvalue

introduced_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Variance

introduced_concepts.name: Within-Block Environmental Variance
introduced_concepts.definition: The residual environmental variance within blocks after stratification.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 分层后区组内部剩余的环境方差。

introduced_concepts.name: Variance
introduced_concepts.definition: A measure of spread around the mean.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量一个量围绕平均值分散程度的指标。

introduced_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Value

introduced_concepts.name: Distance
introduced_concepts.definition: A measure of separation between states, values, or functions.

introduced_concepts.name: Count

prerequisite_concepts.name: F Sub Ii
prerequisite_concepts.definition: F Sub Ii is a local mathematical quantity introduced by the supporting formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: F Sub Ii 是由当前支撑公式引入的局部数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Time
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A quantity indexing the stage, generation, or interval of the process.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 表示过程所处阶段、世代或时间间隔的量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Absolute Fitness
prerequisite_concepts.definition: Fitness measured on an absolute scale before normalization.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 归一化之前、按绝对尺度衡量的适合度。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Model Specified
prerequisite_concepts.definition: Model Specified is a local mathematical quantity introduced by the supporting formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: Model Specified 是由当前支撑公式引入的局部数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Parameter Vector
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A collection of model parameters treated as one vector.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 把多个模型参数作为一个向量整体表示。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Eigenvalue
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A scalar value associated with a matrix transformation or correlation structure.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 矩阵变换或相关结构中的特征值。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Vector or Matrix Quantity
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A structured mathematical quantity represented as a vector or matrix.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Identity Matrix
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A matrix with ones on the diagonal and zeros elsewhere.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 对角线为 1、其他位置为 0 的矩阵。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Vector or Matrix Quantity
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A structured mathematical quantity represented as a vector or matrix.

prerequisite_concepts.name: Beta
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A model parameter, regression coefficient, or distribution-shape parameter named beta in the local context.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 局部模型中记为 beta 的参数、回归系数或分布形状参数。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Estimator Vector
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A vector-valued statistic used to estimate several parameters.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 用于同时估计多个参数的向量统计量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Value
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The additive genetic contribution to an individual or trait value.

prerequisite_concepts.name: Coefficient
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A scalar multiplier that controls the size of a term in the formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 控制公式中某一项大小的乘数。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Distance
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A measure of separation between states, values, or functions.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量状态、数值或函数之间分离程度的量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Model Specified by

prerequisite_concepts.definition: A structured mathematical quantity represented as a vector or matrix.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Identity Matrix
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A matrix with ones on the diagonal and zeros elsewhere.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 对角线为 1、其他位置为 0 的矩阵。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Vector or Matrix Quantity
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A structured mathematical quantity represented as a vector or matrix.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Beta
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A model parameter, regression coefficient, or distribution-shape parameter named beta in the local context.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 局部模型中记为 beta 的参数、回归系数或分布形状参数。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Estimator Vector
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A vector-valued statistic used to estimate several parameters.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 用于同时估计多个参数的向量统计量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Value
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The additive genetic contribution to an individual or trait value.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 个体或性状值中的加性遗传贡献。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Coefficient
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A scalar multiplier that controls the size of a term in the formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 控制公式中某一项大小的乘数。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Distance
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A measure of separation between states, values, or functions.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量状态、数值或函数之间分离程度的量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Model Specified by
prerequisite_concepts.definition: Model Specified by is a local mathematical quantity introduced by the supporting formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: Model Specified by 是由当前支撑公式引入的局部数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Function
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Function
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Index
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A position marker used to identify a class, state, or summation term.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 用于标记类别、状态或求和项位置的下标。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Mean
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The average value of a quantity in the relevant distribution or population.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 相关分布或群体中某个量的平均值。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Fitness
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A measure of reproductive success or contribution to the next generation.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量个体繁殖成功或对下一代贡献的量。

introduced_concepts.name: Vector or Matrix Quantity
introduced_concepts.definition: A structured mathematical quantity represented as a vector or matrix.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

introduced_concepts.name: Vector or Matrix Quantity
introduced_concepts.definition: A structured mathematical quantity represented as a vector or matrix.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

introduced_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Variance
introduced_concepts.definition: Additive Genetic Variance is a background quantity used in the local formula context.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Additive Genetic Variance 是当前公式中使用的背景量，用来帮助理解公式中的符号关系。

introduced_concepts.name: Variance
introduced_concepts.definition: A measure of spread around the mean.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量一个量围绕平均值分散程度的指标。

introduced_concepts.name: Within-Block Environmental Variance
introduced_concepts.definition: The residual environmental variance within blocks after stratification.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 分层后区组内部剩余的环境方差。

introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 对个体、事件或类别数量的离散计数。

views.name: Vector or Matrix Quantity
views.definition: A structured mathematical quantity represented as a vector or matrix.
views.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Time
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A quantity indexing the stage, generation, or interval of the process.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 表示过程所处阶段、世代或时间间隔的量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Absolute Fitness
prerequisite_concepts.definition: Fitness measured on an absolute scale before normalization.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 归一化之前、按绝对尺度衡量的适合度。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Model Specified
prerequisite_concepts.definition: Model Specified is a local mathematical quantity introduced by the supporting formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: Model Specified 是由当前支撑公式引入的局部数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Parameter Vector
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A collection of model parameters treated as one vector.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 把多个模型参数作为一个向量整体表示。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Eigenvalue
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A scalar value associated with a matrix transformation or correlation structure.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 矩阵变换或相关结构中的特征值。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Vector or Matrix Quantity
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A structured mathematical quantity represented as a vector or matrix.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Identity Matrix
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A matrix with ones on the diagonal and zeros elsewhere.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 对角线为 1、其他位置为 0 的矩阵。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Vector or Matrix Quantity
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A structured mathematical quantity represented as a vector or matrix.

prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Beta
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A model parameter, regression coefficient, or distribution-shape parameter named beta in the local context.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 局部模型中记为 beta 的参数、回归系数或分布形状参数。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Estimator Vector
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A vector-valued statistic used to estimate several parameters.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 用于同时估计多个参数的向量统计量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Value
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The additive genetic contribution to an individual or trait value.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 个体或性状值中的加性遗传贡献。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Coefficient
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A scalar multiplier that controls the size of a term in the formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 控制公式中某一项大小的乘数。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Distance
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A measure of separation between states, values, or functions.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量状态、数值或函数之间分离程度的量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Model Specified by
prerequisite_concepts.definition: Model Specified by is a local mathematical quantity introduced by the supporting formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: Model Specified by 是由当前支撑公式引入的局部数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Function
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Function
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Index
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A position marker used to identify a class, state, or summation term.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 用于标记类别、状态或求和项位置的下标。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Mean
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The average value of a quantity in the relevant distribution or population.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 相关分布或群体中某个量的平均值。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Fitness
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A measure of reproductive success or contribution to the next generation.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量个体繁殖成功或对下一代贡献的量。

introduced_concepts.name: M
introduced_concepts.definition: M is a background quantity used in the local formula context.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: M 是当前公式涉及的背景概念，用来帮助解释模型中的生物学含义。

introduced_concepts.name: Population Size
introduced_concepts.definition: The number of individuals or gene copies represented by the population model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 模型中表示的个体数或基因拷贝数。

introduced_concepts.name: Variance
introduced_concepts.definition: A measure of spread around the mean.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量一个量围绕平均值分散程度的指标。

introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 局部模型中记为 beta 的参数、回归系数或分布形状参数。

introduced_concepts.name: Within-Block Environmental Variance
introduced_concepts.definition: The residual environmental variance within blocks after stratification.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 分层后区组内部剩余的环境方差。
